title: Cuneiform Tablet #0473: Early Dynastic Marriage Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Early Dynastic period. Marriage Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records marriage contract matters typical of Early Dynastic period administrative or literary practice.
